headline: IDEXX Laboratories Does Not Need More Vet Visits--But It Needs More Tests Per Visit
summary: IDEXX Laboratories (IDXX) is rated Hold, as its premium valuation (~38x 2026E EPS) already assumes strong recurring revenue and diagnostics growth.
